49e96ec8f57ef7c84a5f4ad95dcedce5f2f51da8: IPO — how, when, and how much
efd527025f9cfb257c828a2a6b0aa683a30a08e0: Inspeção Periódica Obrigatória (IPO) — mandatory periodic inspection. A new car's first IPO is after 4 years, then every 2 years until 8 years old, after which it is annual. It is carried out at IMT-accredited centres (CERTIEL / SGS / Riberalves / Controlauto, etc.). Costs €30–40 for light class B. Bring: DUA, insurance, owner's ID, driver's licence.
af9fde27d26320f7dc04b86bde355358381b4057: IPO is regulated by Decreto-Lei 144/2017 and Portaria 178/2023. Oversight is by IMT (Instituto da Mobilidade e dos Transportes). Certified centres operate under concession, with a unified IMT database.

0f289c7ca8f0b2d3a425cea094ad50e166b3d757: Imposto Único de Circulação (IUC) — annual tax on vehicle ownership in Portugal. Payable in the month of the anniversary of the vehicle's first registration. Calculation depends on the class (A–E), engine size, CO2 emissions, and year. For a passenger car with a 1.4L petrol engine — typically €40–€120, large diesel — €300–€700. Payment online via Portal das Finanças, card / MBWay / Multibanco. Late payment — fine of 10–50%.

e8f4feb3bcee4c2b4bd54e6cdeefe4d391a07170: A flat tyre on the motorway — correct procedure
d0aabd48d6b0a3fb1ec45f2111de570d482d646c: Changing a tyre on Portuguese autoestradas is strictly prohibited on the carriageway. The procedure is: hazard lights → pull over to emergency lane → triangle 30 m → vest → call assistance (707 500 501 Brisa or 707 509 510 IP). For regular drivers — travel assistance insurance usually covers towing and shuttle.
83c564defbbf739195643def19f257b27913de74: 🛞 DO NOT brake sharply — keep the steering wheel steady, gradually ease off the accelerator

dd85d1c85b61a39731bafa4401602804ae5f1489: If a tyre bursts at speeds over 100 km/h and you lose control — do not try to stop immediately, gradually reduce speed, steer to the centre of the lane, stabilise the vehicle.

4d573fe24091aa3d5fdfe89bd1ec3f1c42e37561: Traffic fines in Portugal — types, points, appeals
493031e256a6174f3e3c33d28881bedf8e004a53: Fines from ANSR (Autoridade Nacional de Segurança Rodoviária) are divided into light (leves), serious (graves), and very serious (muito graves). A driver has 12 points in the 'carta por pontos' system — points are deducted for violations. At 0 points — driving licence suspension. 50% discount if paid within 15 days. Appeals — 15 days in writing to ANSR or court.
64dbbf302bdc22acfc0eb06a8d1a6d0f2821f181: Example: not wearing a seatbelt, crossing a stop line, failing to yield to a pedestrian
26d121f2cc2d184de24718bf7522ac5b82048faa: Example: speeding 30–60 km/h on the motorway, crossing a solid line, overtaking at a crossing
9d7ecb673271f9e1009897e006fc7b8c2ae63074: Example: speeding over 60 km/h, driving under the influence, driving against oncoming traffic, running a red light
9619dc14bc99541ebeef9d6244fa644123bc640d: Possible suspension of driving rights for up to 2 years
4edf64af90a99648fdce851d9791b97d30538a2f: The points-based licence has been in effect since 1 June 2016. Each driver starts with 12 points, which are deducted for violations. Points are automatically restored: +1 for every 3 years without incidents.

cfc1d7797dfa7077f9aa1858c66612201f185c89: 🚨 0 points immediately for: > 80 km/h speeding, alcohol > 1.2 g/l, fleeing (hit and run)
b5107bdbc72b98c2c803996855dde7a3b4924ad4: ✅ Improvement course — restore 4 points once every 5 years
fd88cadaae78f0b33cd404c2f129d38bd47472db: According to the rules: urban 50 km/h, extra-urban 90 km/h, motorway 120 km/h. Minimum 7% margin of error for cameras. Fines:

c5799fbbc604259dda3e325c17dc25bd246f85cd: 🍺 > 0.5 g/l (< 2 years experience — > 0.2 g/l): Serious — €250–€1250, −3 points, ban 1–12 months
b612b00ae7d8823d57f5c5d0a320ec790d9109e9: 🥃 > 0.8 g/l: Very Serious — €500–€2500, −4 points, ban 2–12 months
188383131dbd937107cd720c071c79ac493e3066: 🍾 > 1.2 g/l: CRIMINAL case — up to 1 year in prison or fine, −6 points, ban 3–24 months
7b30ff838ceffc91117656ff251dae9559ecc20a: 💊 Drugs: equivalent to > 1.2 g/l, plus criminal liability
fb476892630b00b55fd5192fd081196132ea0f78: 🚨 Fuga (fled the scene with suspicion of alcohol) — 0 points immediately

04fa9abc7c87be447adf748e2a427142134234aa: If you do not appeal and do not pay — the fine becomes an enforceable document. It can be collected from your salary, IBAN, or through property seizure.
1ba22a8ea6afb4289d53450a342e2d70a09f2d96: Via Verde (electronic toll system) — a complete guide to electronic tolls in Portugal
8912ebbbf92db0980135a01cdcd41dd03758f7d5: Via Verde is the electronic payment for tolls via identificador (transponder). Subscription from €5 activation + €1.75/month. An alternative is post-payment through `portagens.ctt.pt` or CTT/Payshop terminals, with a timeframe of 48 hours / 5 working days. Without payment, the fine is 25× the toll cost + potential blocking of DUA.
13c36da34916a43632f33827c08eea4bd0c4e17f: Via Verde Portugal — a concession by Brisa / Ascendi / IP (Infraestruturas de Portugal). It is the leading electronic toll collection system: a small device (identificador) on the windscreen that automatically deducts the fee when passing under the portal without stopping.
0814bbff7da0a7de27ff9e7cc371f015ed6071a0: Covers ALL toll roads and bridges in Portugal
14ad3af1b8954df76a27e1f04e688ef36b7c4e95: Also works in the parking lots of many airports and shopping centres
6301ea40468a702e3ebe0dc249e922de43cfd939: Operates in Spain (Bip&Drive) and France (TIS) with the same device
517b88988cfe1cc6b26dfe392fdd1afa62a7aa19: Online at `viaverde.pt` or via the «Via Verde» app
118a1d4767e69d1e115a95c16ef0e572001ce385: Required: NIF, ID (CC/residence permit), vehicle details (matrícula, modelo), IBAN or card
8dcb5ab875a7c97ec8970799f38e69d0867a7e9c: Delivery of identificador — 3–5 working days via CTT
99f25f2b732480558ecddb21988a6ac674971ff6: The «Via Verde Digital» version is available — a virtual transponder in the app without a device (works in PT via number recognition)
e54e3860086a2ee7b253757811bb5f3fbc328a48: Special rate for tourists. Available at Lisbon/Porto/Faro airports or CTT terminals. Linked to a bank card. Payment based on actual journeys, no subscription required.
e28cd0894e0c8bf6cb811ec67623bf6e38c94c5b: Millennium, Santander, Novo Banco — allow you to order Via Verde directly in the bank app with direct debit.
c86ef42dab88d066afb7f23591550ac50711cfcd: 💶 Activation of identificador: ~€5–10 one-off (with deposit refund upon cancellation)
85340ec14b5870641808a9f20f1e893ec6b621fd: 💶 Toll rate — fixed per section (for example, Lisbon → Porto via A1 ~€22)
6ccfb1a6fee36c58cb1aa4fd34b438fbb66e41c5: 💶 Via Verde Visitors: no subscription fee, only a percentage on top
ed7243687b5fabb7a17a797739743607e33a657d: 🏷️ Discounts for electric vehicles on several routes
0e732a5f6401fdb7950ce0806b6201a7cc518abc: 🏷️ "Multiple devices" — discount for multiple cars on one account
e30fa4455d489bef5a96f5b16c73859e967bdb2d: Rates are updated annually on 1 January. The current price list is only available at `viaverde.pt`.
09b4402815f9d86575c5788a425858944bdbf211: If you don't have Via Verde — how to pay
fca12ca48b7dc612837f2fd8b7c91aa4e9396b44: A. Electronic tolls (ex-SCUT, for example A22 Algarve)
9d29618d02f4a1073c6952af821f9375cbbec789: No booths — only portals with cameras. They read the number plate and send the bill.
63d20103a90df90f34a7498d46e0280b951d4411: Payment at CTT / Payshop terminals within 48 hours after passing
7a5a9bc2ae0b1988c8b40425dacb83ae498ea7c1: Pre-payment at petrol stations — link your card in advance
12abdabc6116c6febd4730b990327056227d09ad: After 5 working days, a fine of +25× the cost
3296e390959ac20d402f68ce0d4b4ecbbc5fc208: B. Classic tolls (A1, A2, A5 — with booths)
5a65b2a18471ec71e852e226926e00456ade8c7b: You can pay in cash or by card at the booth. Exit with the sign "Outras Vias". Do not confuse with "Via Verde" (green lane) — only for those with a device, otherwise a fine.
859e3637a89cc9b30eacfa2123c5666e9c595561: All major rentals (Europcar, Avis, Sixt, Goldcar, Drivalia) offer Via Verde rental. The average price is €3–5/day + toll costs. You cannot opt out on ex-SCUT — otherwise, the rental company will charge you fines.

ac4121ceb72b0bb8a28fc4b6cdc6ebc1f47e6af5: Opening a bank account in Portugal (for non-residents and residents)
a42f0535d544b1eeb05aa7180eb22bbeb744942e: There are about 9 major banks in Portugal with a Banco de Portugal licence. Several offer fully online account opening for non-residents with a Portuguese NIF (tax ID). Typical process: video identification, basic KYC, IBAN issued on the same day, card sent by post in 5-10 days. Basic services are free for most with minimal activity.
c0602148fa2299bc2b933a1a0b5fa588a7f45c6f: Why you need a Portuguese account
d8aa2db11d8a44b471e20f9c924cd3d3f4dfc88f: A bank account in Portugal with an IBAN starting with PT50 is necessary for most everyday procedures: registering long-term rentals, direct debits (utilities, taxes, traffic fines), receiving salaries, making investments, receiving benefits from Segurança Social (social security), applying for a residence permit (some types require proof of funds in a PT account).
9a8b3d7c1079b83df97a70ed3ef34b0c6afa3fd6: An IBAN from another EU country (IE, DE, LT, etc.) is technically equivalent to a Portuguese one under SEPA regulations, but in practice, several Portuguese counterparts refuse direct debit for foreign IBANs. For full compatibility, a PT IBAN is needed.
72473c70a36d423ce4aaa37d84f75be8f174e320: Large universal banks: Millennium BCP, Caixa Geral de Depósitos (state bank), Novo Banco, Santander Totta, BPI
81e8d27aaa7f91d20a05b67769a6db1d6e0c092e: Online subsidiaries of large banks: ActivoBank (from Millennium BCP)
b9991a72fecaf1ef7da3a28209cb2c8fb58bd946: Digital neobanks with EU licence operating in Portugal: Revolut (LT), N26 (DE), Wise (BE) — IBAN not PT, but SEPA works
5646d7b2b8ad133c2f05f0bb23b109306ec7705d: Cooperative and regional banks: Crédito Agrícola, Montepio — often convenient in small towns
bbec3904069c7bb5003a66034208821836a7a0d2: Accounts at CTT (post office): CTT Bank — state postal operator with basic banking services
47b8e42087e074bf65e0f5525344b8c628feda43: All listed are licensed by Banco de Portugal or the EU regulator; deposits up to €100,000 are insured (Fundo de Garantia de Depósitos for PT-licensed).
ec1ce14b2cbf107508793423b7755150967df840: Several banks allow fully online account opening for clients with a NIF. The process: video identification with an operator in Portuguese or English, electronic signature via Chave Móvel Digital (government electronic signature) or through video confirmation. This is suitable even if you are not yet in Portugal, but already have a NIF.
9a49b3205bed65ed66e13ca3283009a761ed2734: The classic route is to visit a branch with your passport, NIF, proof of address, and sometimes proof of income. Large banks often require in-person identification for non-residents.
48f995b116c003e8e71d1211fc6c7ad59ca35b57: Passport (valid for ≥ 6 months, for non-EU citizens)
c46ffcbef562abbd0e050374363c17df7f8b138e: Proof of address — rental contract, utility bill, or bank statement not older than 3 months
28f94fd40396c029b06dd8348db9a6d20400d99a: Proof of income/source of funds — payslip, bank statement, employer's declaration
a46d55bef8888fa26000ffbe13617886fe0675e8: Portuguese phone number — not mandatory, but greatly simplifies 2FA and MB Way
da2ef47a9093ec0cf5caec861b9ea4d261a39468: On the bank's website or app: full name, NIF, profession, source of income, purpose of the account, tax residency. For non-residents of PT, you need to indicate the country of current tax residency (CRS/DAC2 compliance).
f3ec7353958b0a82c067b9a69c645b4b53195f14: Scans/photos of passport, NIF, proof of address. Quality: all corners visible, no glare.
36cd9685234cf06cbeda349ce654dec6965ab195: Video call lasting 5-15 minutes. The operator asks to show the passport, turn it, and asks control questions (according to AML regulations). They speak in PT or EN, sometimes ES.
f3ca65c77f8de74f4e6e0050e9e528f0f40dba8c: Electronic signature: either through Chave Móvel Digital or via confirmation code from email + SMS.
3366225c166baa33346bcefe8a001ea0d4ec6026: The IBAN is active on the day of approval (1-3 days). The debit card arrives by post within 5-10 working days.
6083745a435bf526931ca16049919a8043abfd32: What is usually included in the basic package
25139a3da11238cffadc1b53db473876852ace91: Euro account + multi-currency options with some banks
7ddeafd863ff16ee78ecbf6bdef94f9c8fd51ddd: Debit card Visa/Mastercard (free issuance at most online banks)
cefd14ad1fc7a7f5a6ae86007a999949bde816eb: MB Way — a key Portuguese payment service (transfers by phone number, QR, contactless)
eaaee842b018d837065c168243c10edceb7d81b8: SEPA transfers are free within the EU zone
bf04216df456d64cd5fc72bffea3a74a1bf94b3d: Direct debit (utility bills, taxes, traffic fines)
db41c3029d1670c7ea84b31d37206d03b282bda7: Access to Multibanco (ATM network in PT) with withdrawal limits of €200-400/day
5407f205d9726fbc89851804b37837eb6c8d9f4b: Anuidade / manutenção — annual/monthly service fee. Many online banks charge €0 with minimal activity
cfdb6e02983746fe99e219f50d0f6cdb9a689556: Imposto de Selo €4 quarterly — stamp duty on bank accounts (applies even to 'free' accounts)
819247f3482230c1fd9cdc8d56fc6bacd7a5ec9f: Fee for withdrawals at Multibanco of another bank — usually €0 in PT, but there are limits
c28daf28e127d851831d149bfe4bd7fd03d07259: Inactivity fee — some banks charge €3-10/month if the account is not used for 6+ months
b332ad4af1f909fca5e0da2793ee5284f795dee8: Currency exchange (for international transfers): markup 1-3% above the ECB rate
a7566dc673d3dbdbda3e85bbf2d633d9b32f6b67: SWIFT transfer fee outside SEPA: €10-40 + correspondent fees
b7c2bb8ead6768487bfb2a0ab0c0726f3114df03: Banks in PT are required to carry out AML/KYC checks according to Banco de Portugal regulations and EU regulations. Common reasons for refusal when opening an account for non-residents:
78433a16419d4509ba0d6ca584bce951162ce7d7: Mismatch between the address on documents and in the application
e55c3a3cb6878f6fdf935d179c4b4b006e27473e: No proof of source of funds for a large initial deposit
f6031fad52b76c511ce918b5e375efd5b780d59c: Political exposure (PEP) or sanctions filter — refusal or prolonged due diligence

Legal channels remain: small Russian banks without sanctions, non-sanctioned banks from the CIS (KZ, AM, GE), neobanks in the EU (via intermediaries), crypto through regulated exchanges. The key is documenting the source of funds (AML/KYC). Anonymous transfers are not possible.

78add79680c3e5181cc20f0e560e9de6b54f05ef: Documents from the country of origin for PT must be: 1) with an apostille (for Hague Convention countries) or legalised at the consulate; 2) translated by a sworn translator. Without this, they are not accepted by AIMA, Finanças, IRN, universities.
e9547c6cbb86696ad865be46452f8a46bf04510b: Apostille = a stamp confirming the authenticity of an official document for use in another country. Established by the Hague Convention of 1961.
86954cf303cae08be33f5aa4a28686eaac2c9ca3: Hague Convention countries (most) — apostille applies. Countries outside the convention — consular legalisation is required (longer and more expensive).
48956da7982d98f1103537db2f32459babbb7fcd: What to apostille for moving to PT
4260c786cfe4f874ccd21045d93f3bd0d8de8de8: Birth certificate — ALWAYS (for NIF, AIMA, citizenship, marriage)
e7905c09b4cfa19da114f1fd474b6a77aa9351ff: Criminal record certificate — validity 3-6 months, often requires a 'fresh' one.
9ced3e8c48774a1620512c3e11a8b16a8ff2155e: Diploma + supplement + academic certificate — for nostrification
f1536d45a4896feba285fc06813394b4ebb890a8: Passport and residence permit do NOT need to be apostilled — they are internationally recognised by themselves.

5f63c41e745f519f4356412e1994ad9beedfba6e: Ministry of Internal Affairs → apostille through the Ministry of Justice. 2-4 weeks. Can be done remotely via the State Services + consulate, but the consular process is slower.

5da30f3620eac92bfd163c93d1166a99f477ac1f: Civil registry — certificates (apostilled at the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Belarus). Ministry of Internal Affairs — criminal record check (apostille at the Ministry of Justice). Diploma — Ministry of Education of the Republic of Belarus.
5db2cb22c5b9dffb427ca6a218d836f2a72fc213: The timeframe is usually 2-4 weeks. Expedited services are available for in-person requests in Minsk.

91d3a430aac77dabd2fe6fef37dba60ff01cdb64: Option A — Tradutor Certificado at the Conservatória
708c3924c7c7263b60f10858c6de09a29033a5de: The translator makes the translation → certifies it at the Conservatória do Registo Civil. This is the official route.

4561b8b54fa797e50f67f94c2954baa646af8f03: Since February 2022, direct communication with the Russian Federation/Belarus has become complicated: there are no direct flights, SWIFT is restricted. Consulates are operational: apostille of the criminal record certificate through ‘Gosuslugi’ + courier delivery, powers of attorney — through the consulate in Lisbon for citizens in Portugal, remote issuance — through the MFC + notary with eIDAS signature. Most procedures take 2–6 weeks compared to 3–5 days before 2022.

e1bbbf91bf8d1e59a0d731e05fc7932bf0dfbeee: Dual citizenship — a nuance. Portugal allows any dual citizenship. The Brazilian Constitution (art. 12, §4) permits dual citizenship in two cases: (1) you were born a Brazilian citizen (nato) and acquire Portuguese citizenship — Brazilian citizenship is automatically retained; (2) you are a naturalised Brazilian and voluntarily acquire another — Brazilian citizenship is lost. If PT is your country of origin and you obtained your Brazilian passport through naturalisation — you must either renounce one or remain solely Brazilian.

0490be3594c49cb6c75db432b629bbb7aecf0c82: Ukrainians receive temporary protection (Proteção Temporária) — legal residence, work, SNS, school without a separate visa. EU Directive 2001/55/CE, the regime has been extended by the EU Council decision until 4 March 2027. The status is processed at AIMA for free. For long-term relocation — standard D-visas are available.

d2332527d393b8b31b858cebfd0d62c81117fff1: Americans in Portugal — FATCA and double taxation
be4f5a2591c6ef8812e4f1626cfce0ae9d59284e: The USA and Portugal have a double taxation avoidance agreement. However, the USA taxes citizens worldwide (citizenship-based taxation) — FATCA requires PT banks to report. IRS/PT declarations need to be submitted to both countries. FBAR (>$10k in foreign accounts) is mandatory.
63c76afd4b8bf773407146729dbfdd7aaa5a60ec: The USA is one of the few countries that taxes its citizens worldwide regardless of residency. The Treaty PT-USA agreement from 1994 helps avoid double taxation but does not exempt you from declaring.

fab34dd035e1fb3e8399f2ea2f7fa43e86bef56a: Form 8938 (FATCA individual) — if foreign assets > $200,000 at year-end (or $300,000 at any time) for single filers abroad; $400,000 / $600,000 for married filing jointly. This does not replace FBAR — both must be filed
a865892663aef8afb681b4d387c81edb41734711: FATCA requires all banks in PT to report to the IRS about accounts held by US citizens. Most PT banks accept US citizens, but refusals can occur due to compliance burden.

e21f4eacf94b4725d3ded19f3dc2934718a17fee: Since 2022, **Decreto-Lei** 84/2021 is in effect in Portugal: the warranty on new goods has increased from 2 to 3 years, for used — a minimum of 18 months. Upon discovering a defect (**falta de conformidade**), the seller is obliged to repair or replace the item free of charge. If this is not possible — to reduce the price or refund. Keeping the receipt and UPC code is mandatory.
161f708353dec558892c84d4c81ae9e78856debd: Decreto-Lei 84/2021 (implemented from Lei 16/2023) transposed EU Directive 2019/771 on the sale of consumer goods. Applies to ALL B2C purchases in Portugal regardless of the country of origin of the goods and the channel (store, online, marketplace).
751fe578a3c434aabee50d837311003106c8b41b: Used goods: minimum 18 months (the seller can offer more, but not less)
2732964c4ab2a0689677ea1d1d8ddbc40a3fc9c0: Digital content / subscriptions: 2 years from the date of purchase
505a59b00ccf95b8c0aaaae82991b7e4f3481480: Repair / replacement: with the seller, NOT with the manufacturer (this is key)
cb3c01c821e81cfa4715f88c9addc72c47ebb495: Free for the buyer — no 'pay for diagnostics' in the first years
fddf3cc8306870f16cd5a2877a96a95852fb7906: The seller often tries to refer you to the manufacturer — this is illegal. The primary obligation lies with the one who sold it.
16c14f081fe264103c7ea161a0c71f330de2016d: What is considered a 'defect' (falta de conformidade)
c2321bf077455748a10958062196017c524c6643: The product does not match the description in the catalogue/on the website
0191a10ecb8b792d3359a3d1d935fea17459b5d0: A function claimed by the seller or generally expected does not work
6d36754ad4a5486266febaf01fdd0fa6f5a5644d: Accessories listed in the package are missing
ceba43c895d4230799af548e804e82d99fe3fa43: Software specified in the specifications is not installed
a35bad10727bc4e552244ad8ba57ea1d167c99ac: Defects occurring within the warranty period are presumed to be factory defects in the first 2 years (the burden of proof is on the seller)
f17e5b5b0b48fe4235818ef521fd42c9c3ffef73: After 2 years (for new products), the burden shifts to the buyer — but only regarding whether the defect was factory-made and not due to wear and tear. In practice, the official service centre provides an assessment.
8aee388a6751a964daf1207cf883aee08587aefc: 1. Repair or replacement (at the buyer's choice)
f282064163ec8138bd06a4a2ffdf00ad6bd43ba8: The seller must carry this out within a 'reasonable time' — usually 30 days. Transportation is at the seller's expense. Providing a loaner is not mandatory, but large chains (Worten, Fnac, MediaMarkt) usually offer a 'loaner' for large appliances.
94e243e8c8c6cc7c7c931076adb1eeb892734652: If repair/replacement is impossible or takes too long — demand a discount proportional to the defect.
e5037f68aa590d14d4f0dc1c9f8c43e1eb8b4e87: Full refund for a serious defect that renders the product unfit for use, or if the defect reoccurs after repair. The seller refunds the money in the same way (card → card).

4214c7e5d191e975df28fde71fcbf65427f436a7: 📧 Written complaint to the seller (email is sufficient) describing the defect and the request: 'Reclamação de falta de conformidade nos termos do Decreto-Lei 84/2021'
0827da6ad9c949a4ee4eb72322eb11816c6af4ab: 📋 Livro de Reclamações (complaint book): paper in-store or electronic at `livroreclamacoes.pt` (.gov.pt) — a copy is automatically sent to the regulator

Processing — through the recipient: CTT / courier (DHL, FedEx, UPS) send an SMS with a payment link. Payment online by card / MB Way / Multibanco. Customs handling fee CTT ~€1.80, with couriers €10-40. Cheaper through Portal das Alfândegas, but more complicated.

15652a6347cfbb3b5f009fbe5bb2617639b6f521: In PT, there are approximately 13 national holidays + 1-2 municipal ones. Key dates: New Year's Day (1 January), Carnival (February), Easter (March/April), 25 April (Revolution), 1 May, 10 June (Camões), Santos Populares in June, Assumption (15 August), 5 October (Republic), All Saints' Day (1 November), Restoration (1 December), 8 December, Christmas (25 December). A 'Ponte' (bridge) occurs when a holiday falls on a Tuesday/Thursday, often resulting in a long weekend on the preceding Friday or following Monday.
c92bf934e120883759de0dfdbdd4f27dc9f8c847: 1 January — Ano Novo (New Year's Day) — Thursday
7858e10220ed41908802c3c5283f40499251f6d0: 17 February — Carnaval (Tuesday) — unofficial, but many do not work
3a5169ca2636d756992fa7cab785b06782d3efa3: 25 April — Dia da Liberdade (25 April, Carnation Revolution) — Saturday

43f6fa0f0b543fffb55130d347d3db9e0cc1da36: How to survive winter in Portugal — heating and humidity
382c6f02d55d6f671049878a155aeba3a8d86a46: Winter in Portugal is treacherous. Homes are often colder than the street — central heating is NOT available in most houses. Walls are poorly insulated, humidity ~80%. Options: gas water heater, air conditioning with heating, electric heaters, pellet stove. The electricity bill in January can double.
d92de4c80fea1e27f7bca31d4fe0e79d081fb187: Northern Europe thinks 'Portugal = warm all year round' — this is a myth. Lisbon: +5-15°C, Porto: +2-12°C, north: it can snow.
62711b7c9c45ad6d266f6ee8a57abd8a00f74940: But the main problem is not the temperature, but: 1) poor insulation of homes (single glazing, thin walls), 2) lack of central heating, 3) high humidity → mould.
e881c8adfaafce1dc8bff9eee4d323ffb51a939e: If there is a gas contract. Rare in old buildings. Most effective.
e48f0793f08207d4befe99d0af4f7169eb2eae03: Air conditioner with heating (ar condicionado reversível)
84076e4db9e50b9c31feca67db7bbbd92c99f5d3: Popular. Installation price €1,000-2,000 for a split unit. Efficient for mild cooling (+5°C). At -5°C it works poorly.
e70bc6d13ef55c4a313cf918cbfdd695192b5055: Óleo (oil-filled) — €40-80 at Continente/Leroy, safe but slow
1563a9e80a2dc5500e9d4737a29b50f8eaa2ff44: Convector — fast, but dries out the air
89151859e2f20780b49ac842de1f8a10da20ad94: Electric towel rail (for the bathroom) — locally
fac8433e5d5af17371550ee5cd5a1a00c7fb06cc: The main downside is that electricity in PT is expensive (~€0.18/kWh), bills can be 2-3 times higher in winter
16c205b6cd978cfa1c83f4c8540387ff090e2265: Wood pellet stove. Popular in villages and country houses. Pellets cost €4-7 for a 15 kg bag.
03c3b352371d31debd97366ea3ab54b7a7dacf27: Ventilate rooms in the morning for 10-15 minutes even in frost
95395abb49079b4522452cb08262d33f34a5cd84: Dehumidifier (desumidificador) — €50-150, collects 10-20 litres of water per day
b9160c7e83ea8fa5a12ed44e33ca5618c606c7de: Do not dry laundry indoors → mould
29cb0e172e3e26050d0f7301cdf5b69ec6384545: Check windows for condensation = mould in a month
53180deb3293a314c2b6ee714b2e5e0e7fd16bed: Ventilation in the bathroom (mechanical or natural) is critical
2cb0ef998635e0711b1ac37d0bb6410f885169ac: EDP, Iberdrola, Galp, Endesa, Repsol — main ones. Prices comparable in 2026.

7e0977f2017356b32afd30fde361068ea66d4776: Junta de Freguesia — what is it and what services does it provide
967732b33992c2d5409b36862f101c13c517da46: Junta de Freguesia (local parish council) — a local self-government body, like a 'village council' or 'housing management'. Issues atestado de residência (proof of residence, needed for AIMA/SNS), registers união de facto, addresses local street maintenance issues, organises events for seniors and children.
c5cbf5f27fdd7b55862542902bcfc4e26dc338c5: Portugal is administratively divided into: Distrito → Concelho (municipality, Câmara Municipal) → Freguesia (parish). Junta de Freguesia is the executive authority of the freguesia. In Lisbon, there are 24 freguesias, and in Porto, there are 7.

a5a349fcd3c81870d0c0a441bd8da8154bae338a: Noise and neighbours — what is legal, where to complain
6f1e3dc5851761c7663a9f1d7b69851eae92bcb1: In Portugal, quiet hours are from 23:00 to 07:00 (Decreto-Lei 9/2007, Regulamento Geral do Ruído). Music, drilling, dog barking — everything is regulated. Complaints: first peacefully, then to PSP/GNR, Câmara Municipal, and Inspeção-Geral da Agricultura, do Mar, do Ambiente (IGAMAOT). Fines up to €2,500 for individuals, €24,000 for companies.
85d7fa1e929760656d1f76213a7cdfbe84b6ee84: 🌙 Rest period (período de repouso): 23:00 – 07:00 on regular days
620c5a78cf205fc5f3a867e7f197abebe7b54f64: 🌙 Weekends and holidays: often extended to 09:00 in municipal regulations
b9657c988676f1a719e60aa2c014382c2ddd4d23: ☀️ Daytime hours: noise is permitted, but not 'excessive'

e155aa7c575d65c29d102c532d06125564e63862: 14 days for returns — how it works for online vs shops
c6f82124b504c9f40b23e8fdb6c7219b6ef9436a: For distance purchases (online, by phone, catalogue), you have an unconditional 14 days to return without giving reasons (Decreto-Lei 24/2014 + EU 2011/83). In a physical store, returns are at the seller's discretion, unless there is a defect. Exceptions for online: food products, sealed cosmetics/hygiene, digital content after download, personalised goods.
d3f55311b87fab6bbf4d879b29600fde8e805be7: Distance purchases (online, by phone, by catalogue, at exhibitions outside the store) are covered by Decreto-Lei 24/2014. The right of withdrawal (direito de livre resolução) is valid for 14 calendar days from the moment of receipt of the goods.
ff9fbbccf4681a6af5eca4243eecde6a54bb1a3e: No need to explain the reason
717ef7ab24d95682da4aeaa75a3c3b2ef60b1551: Counting starts from the day of physical delivery
42f461e7aae8028a87e459f9e8eb2811db8bee1d: For digital services — from the moment of signing the contract
b3f1e92c2572275db0158b73293fd2fc3eeaad4b: For sets of goods (delivered in parts) — from receipt of the last part
69bb09abeb9761e6f4b001d3d27e37aec87627e7: You can return partially unpacked items if you inspected them as in a store
895fdcffa9254693a9b98ec5ec5f23f83becf9ac: The seller is obliged to inform about the right of withdrawal. If not informed — the period is extended to 12 months.
e1b09807875e430dd5e0e215a48afa5e5cc3e5fa: How to return an online purchase
80cecab9ca6e6f969716bb57b15abde594abb046: The form is flexible: email, form on the website, call with recording. The phrase in Portuguese: «Exerço o meu direito de livre resolução nos termos do Decreto-Lei 24/2014». You can use the standard form from Annex B of the law.
390d6a317e396e6971d1e4ab684cbf076f03240a: The deadline for sending back is 14 days from notification
eea561b9bd3b2dcf8ca6c51d8d17f629d2d82cc4: Return shipping is at the buyer's expense (unless the seller has taken it on themselves)
0a8c9a7eda6fc8e9c7038f5bd409c8703946df79: Keep the tracking number and receipt — this is your proof
24af2d9ae4d0708e0998ae8802dfc8e57466e438: The item must be in reasonable packaging, with accessories
f8c07882038d623d6cc8c1ef54d364964d2fd421: The seller is obliged to refund within 14 days from the receipt of notification (they may withhold until the item is received). The method of refund must be the same as the payment. A processing fee cannot be withheld.
f3d328537d1d2479285e423b024f755ada7f55d0: When the 14 days DO NOT apply
b6e555d29929a7a31ada49c0832ca264e5b4bed5: 💧 Sealed hygiene/health products after opening (cosmetics, underwear, contact lenses)
f5ad6cf118215834250577a603c8b3551abacb03: 🎟️ Bookings with a fixed date (hotel, flight, concert)
eb52923acc6a875251a94fdd295fca3107e248bf: 💻 Digital content after download begins, if the buyer has agreed
b5ab17df09b87e075a277416cbd498e93f2c9794: 🏠 Alcoholic beverages with delayed delivery > 30 days
7c881ea5b779371a1f0d2b7a8bbe58ae013dd3af: 🧾 Goods mixed with others after delivery (fuel, gravel)
8df8a8ec536ab029a903e1a217d3a19906be0184: Purchase in a physical store without defect — return NOT guaranteed by law. Depends on the store's policy.
2ac723c2417660e7ba8146067e369df0c7924e81: 🏬 Large chains (Continente, Pingo Doce, Worten, Fnac, H&M, Zara) often give 15–30 days
a8033a799a2b8695b7fa94c2ba70c5ef4170233f: 🧾 Receipt and item in original packaging required

8856ff6cbdb594ea6ed019cf597527e26ca74b4e: ⚠️ Without a receipt — chances are practically zero
f928d60e5852b7bcf396f12f3614ea7e64a4c468: The existence of a '14-day return right' in a physical store is a myth. It's the seller's goodwill or a promotional promise.
d69ce638773c3c277d258a33d3b56b793eb53afd: Seller ignores — complaint in Livro de Reclamações (paper or `livroreclamacoes.pt`)
323c46d046a28b6eac849c876c8af9da01eb22fc: Automatic sending of a copy to ASAE or the industry regulator

e32a1c75b22f86e01ebc47df2e8d4a410019c25d: Pharmacies in Portugal — Farmácia and Parafarmácia
3cf0b34be100280f720c04c14193287117dfe31e: Farmácia (green cross) — sells prescription and over-the-counter medicines, pharmacist consultation. Parafarmácia — only over-the-counter, skincare cosmetics. With NIF — 37-90% SNS discount on prescriptions. “Farmácia de serviço” — on-call pharmacy at night, operates 24/7 in the area.
7afb8eec9f8b78512323aef4b18acffebf1c1d1f: The green cross on the sign. INFARMED licence. Only prescription medications are purchased here. The pharmacist provides consultations for free. Usually open from 9:00 to 19:30 + Saturday until 13:00.
6c50f20b7c08a3c3b864a1dc34e89c0c1bc0a709: In supermarkets, separately. Only over-the-counter products: vitamins, personal care, some OTC medications (ibuprofen, cough syrup). Prices are 10-20% lower than farmácia. Very popular are Auchan Bem-Estar, Celeiro, Wells.
6573808abdc9bc4924194dc3dcd278f739ae9055: You get the prescription from a doctor (SNS or private). Electronic — you receive an SMS with a code and password. Paper — if issued by a private doctor without SNS connection.
2cfa137c09cbf21a52278cfc6f08b6d5077155e4: Show the prescription code (SMS) + passport/CC. The pharmacist can see it in the system. Payment with SNS discount (10-90% depending on the medication).

d67e307dba7a9b129d5b423f29bcade80ffc0321: Many medications (OTC) are sold freely. But antibiotics, sleeping pills, and strong painkillers are only available by prescription, unlike in some countries.
f7c1011d1f2cfb4056a07527babbd45d18ebdd5e: Farmácia de Serviço - every night in each district, one pharmacy is on duty 24/7. The list is on the door of any farmácia or on the INFARMED website.
38fbc4edc1371df4bc19837c13300157dec0a0c7: 📍 farmacias.pt - website with a list of on-call pharmacies by postal code
8061f051c0ddedb9d3f12650c33a319b1db9b938: 📞 112 in case of emergency - they will direct you to the nearest one
e1a2c18d596d63aec9b13688fe27d5344c47c77f: 💊 After 10 PM, call via intercom - the pharmacist will hand out through the window
afd088c45af3d684df40f530e29f87b5db9e848f: 💰 There is a surcharge of about €2.50 at night
510216dbff181d07cc0e8bcf019ca3d3289f3bf6: Parafarmácia or Farmácia: Ibuprofen, Paracetamol (Ben-U-Ron), Bisolvon, Cegripe.
2046c5b8dbbf7d5ded8b4ad46a0a0305868283b0: Loratadine, Aerius, Cetirizine - available without a prescription at farmácia.
2fa4c39a5f15582e2c18f415fe2aad4a13fc917a: Only with a prescription. Amoxicillin, Azithromycin.
4d40771316c2fb56c26cc6c3abba490ed5040fec: Sunscreen and skincare — any parafarmácia. Avène, La Roche-Posay, Uriage, Nuxe are popular.
1d4811ad1fbc624624fc8503fc39352ffc332220: Condoms — everywhere. Birth control pills — with a prescription (but SNS subsidiary is cheap).
496621456d7cbe171468cbafc8a0d87701df7652: Portuguese — basic phrases for the first weeks
8874def7df5ac38ede74e326cf58867cbb59190a: European Portuguese differs from Brazilian: different pronunciation (vowel reduction), 'tu' is less common, 'você' is formal. English is understood in tourist areas of Lisbon/Porto, but less reliably in Finanças/AIMA/pharmacies. Learning at least 20-30 phrases BEFORE arrival pays off greatly.

aff314bc155b2aea881ec3f042f6016bcf7e1d99: European Portuguese swallows unstressed vowels. 'Desenvolvimento' sounds like 'дзнвлвимэ́нту'. This makes it harder to understand than Brazilian Portuguese.
fad5adb2a3ac5010b597254d29c71c05e80c7c2b: «ão» (pão — bread) — nasal «a-u». «em» / «ens» — nasal «e». The tilde over the letter is a marker.

5b75395898b99e473cd88333501d29a8ac31b5c8: LH = «lh» (trabalho), NH = «nh» (senhor). Like the Spanish ll and ñ.
008130d0a455c79a0abe6cc0090cefae62285da2: «X» = «sh» (caixa — kaisha) in most cases. But sometimes «ks» (tóxico), «z» (exemplo), «s» (próximo). Remember the exceptions.

458bcede991eb1786062f188703ecbbd548528ba: Waste separation and disposal in Portugal
ca6c099657dd288e11c84799ae2c0df298821608: In Portugal, the EU standard is separate collection. The main colours of the bins are: yellow (ecoponto amarelo) — plastic and metal, blue — paper and cardboard, green — glass, brown — organic (where available), grey/black — general waste. Bulky items and electronics are collected separately, through the municipality. Violations result in fines.
a21beabfed4c91ca3bcfd02e9a53680ac3c377a5: Municipalities (câmaras municipais) are responsible for waste collection in PT through contractors. Payment is included as part of the water bill. The system is based on EU Directive 2008/98/EC and national Lei 102/2020.
d25c60ee2987a3d1649f0e05c56c76d35c12ab53: The main principle is separate containers (ecopontos) in residential areas. In apartments, you sort at home and take it to the ecoponto near your house.

937df770adfeabe13ea869afe5b674699939ff3e: ❌ DO NOT put dirty pizza boxes, napkins, waxed paper
8eab400fbd8d6561a204c486a0cfeb39f197a4ef: ❌ DO NOT put: cups, light bulbs, mirrors, ceramics — they go in general waste
1a233b5fbfa6793b3174383b2f4c0ef6ba0879bd: NOT everywhere — depends on the municipality. Lisbon and Porto — being implemented in some areas

7eb770a22dfc40772501fe9c66a679e7965cae09: In PT, there are 3 essential services: electricity, water, gas (if connected). Electricity / gas — liberalised (you choose the supplier): EDP, Galp, Iberdrola, Endesa, etc. Water — always municipal (EPAL in Lisbon). Changing suppliers — free and without interruptions. Address transfer of contracts when moving — 5–15 days, without penalty, according to law Decreto-Lei 38/2017.
06f7cec73bc16920194edfc041e7deb6b011c210: Electricity and gas in PT have been liberalised since 2015 — anyone can be a supplier, prices are free. Since 2021, a regulated tariff has returned for vulnerable clients (seniors, low income).

492d3816ebaa1f1a3eccb2e66d4e0ed6db0a05dd: 💧 Water: municipal (EPAL, SMAS, Águas do Douro, etc.) — cannot choose

574ae658a54263ac409eed8839b215451041101e: Request through the app: **Alteração de morada do contrato** (Change of address of the contract). The tariff and contract number are retained. Duration 5–10 days.

1ddac6eda5b702fdb933e4bac8ce4cd5856c8ab3: Reactivation needed: €50–100 + technician on site. Duration up to 15 days. If the meter is old — mandatory replacement.

258a157d101875b98e802f67974a3789614ba0b7: CMD — digital signature from the Portuguese government. Without it, you cannot: access the AIMA portal for renewals, Segurança Social Direta (social security online portal), Finanças, sign documents online. It can be activated for free at Loja de Cidadão or using your Cartão de Cidadão (Portuguese citizen card).
758d8ea8e67664e1c95ada665529afa946b60751: Chave Móvel Digital (CMD) — government login + digital signature. Similar to "Gosuslugi" or BankID. Used for accessing AIMA, SNS, Finanças, IRN, court, ePortugal.

c7d891c2f3ca3d9ea4ff602ceee8fd38816857c1: In PT, the 'Assinatura Digital Qualificada (qualified electronic signature)' (QES) operates — an electronic signature with the same legal validity as a handwritten one. Two official tools: Chave Móvel Digital (mobile) and Cartão de Cidadão (Portuguese citizen card) + USB reader/NFC. With QES, you can sign rental contracts, notarial documents, and submit to AIMA/Finanças/IRN without paper.
82449089d7e0378f45c06aac584ca2019b58fbc2: Electronic signature in the EU is regulated by the eIDAS regulation (Regulation (EU) 910/2014). In PT — Decreto-Lei 12/2021 adapts eIDAS into national legislation.
6d0af2d860f121d118ed076a573811e812f2d535: Three levels of signature under eIDAS:
4f153a5cc37b967d3950532ffa5111dd33c1e848: • Simples (SES) — email, SMS code, etc. Basic evidential strength
dc6da07ab4901815a83c3c348438daa1428ee388: • Avançada (AES) — cryptographically unique, linked to the signer
1a8d8a4b35adb46f2e9c2577aa2d6ab69ebf82a6: • Qualificada (QES) — AES + QTSP certificate + QSCD device. Legally equivalent to handwritten in ALL EU
014d844dccdeaa15945470549601e13ed2cd7738: 🇵🇹 PT provides QES through two official tools: CMD and CC digital
085d2c8e55519983ea62332ba8213e6654e1f8c5: If CMD is activated, the signing function is enabled separately. Go to autenticacao.gov.pt → ‘Ativar Assinatura Digital’ → confirm PIN and SMS. Free of charge.
f6a05ffe625c5b495a1d848b1d1fb3d50a642a33: Open the document on the Autenticação.gov Digital Signature portal
d374b6cfaaa273878b3aafa27dfeb2217302653a: Confirm with SMS code (or push notification via the Autenticação app)
1ce0a8b636a6c297e3f45e398b14d983db6b01f2: Download the signed PDF — with cryptographic certificate
17c695e5e36a688b4a7d24244e776b9d40bf521b: Anyone can verify the signature at autenticacao.gov.pt/validacao-de-assinaturas — they can see the signer's name, time, and status.
987f7cdd0210e31958c85c0c25f66416df736ec7: For PT citizens with CC (this option is not available for non-residents — they have a residence permit without a signature chip). A USB reader or NFC phone is required.
23ec06c03f7e63764a844b597b8f6ddb6d8047ff: Upon first receiving CC, the signing function is often disabled. Activation can be done at any Espaço Cidadão or online via Autenticação.gov with a USB reader.

75e4921284dba976ae25087e35f76ab95d5f55dd: Under eIDAS, a signature from one EU country is recognised in all others. A CMD signature from PT has full legal validity in Germany, Spain, France, Italy, and more.
1f2bfaa859987aaef4cf3d5f744c837fc1fc2b58: Verification: a signed PDF can be validated on any EU portal (DSS Validator from EU Commission — dss.nowina.lu).
4a69987b777105174b1b6aa8d585dba69aaa3366: Outside the EU (Russia, USA, China) — recognition depends on local laws and agreements. In Russia, eIDAS signatures are not automatically recognised — for documents intended for Russia, a separate Russian digital signature is required.

72dc3718654db6ae24ab14ea0e96589dd6e21727: Cartão de Cidadão (Portuguese citizen card) — for residents and citizens
f45bba529a72f3a30010f98f1b291c55fbfe50c9: Cartão de Cidadão (CC) — multifunctional identification: passport within PT + NIF + NISS + utente + biometric document + digital signature. Mandatory for PT citizens; foreign residents receive the equivalent — Título de Residência (residence permit). Replacement/renewal — at IRN or Loja de Cidadão.

57585ea948637a557fe3f7edf85798c190415e1e: The tax address (domicílio fiscal) is a mandatory field in Finanças. When moving, you must change it within 60 days (art. 43 LGT). The change is free and can be done online at portaldasfinancas.gov.pt in 3 minutes. The address affects: where AT letters will be sent, which regional office is yours, what IMI property tax applies, and the IRS rate (Madeira and Açores have discounts).

Free at Finanças in person (if already holding a visa/Schengen) or €70–150 through an online representative (market range 2026).

7a6a2156de89b8d8a9d123d85b2c3c2b03d3d489: 9-digit tax number. Issued by Autoridade Tributária (tax authority) and Aduaneira. 7339e61c70d364971108d898e83df9a8e5f9dfef: Education in Portugal is compulsory from 6 to 18 years. State schools are free, with enrolment based on the area of residence through the Portal das Matrículas. Private schools are available (€3k-15k/year) and international schools (€10k-25k/year). New student admissions are open until 15 June for September; foreigners can apply throughout the year.
29d16236534dbc5f5e99e27cacd949d223aa49ef: Free for all residents. Quality varies by region (ratings available). Language — Portuguese. For non-native speakers — PLNM programme (Portuguese as a Non-Mother Language).
1f8d630a6439dcff67e6f84107ec2e4150356d08: €3,000 – 15,000/year. Smaller classes, more extracurricular activities. Language — Portuguese or bilingual.
131fd08fad5a05d266a9078351f7e7d57f3c7302: €10,000 – 25,000/year. IB/British/French/American programmes. Lisbon/Porto/Algarve. Popular: St. Julian's, CAISL (Carlucci American International School of Lisbon), International Preparatory, German School, French Lycée.
88db3518b766e4d255781f1119a109a42689ebbb: Permitted with registration at DGESTE. Annual exams at partner schools.
14cef81d12c1e6cd140add71397b4c87ecea70d0: Creche (0-3 years) — not mandatory, paid even in public institutions
13fac28e6e4bbd5a51f04223bd00cb72888bc0e7: Pré-escolar / Jardim de Infância (3-6 years) — mandatory from age 5
8962b21a33b1641f8826773d96dc0cf228f0944e: Secundário (10th-12th grade, 15-18 years) — mandatory. Options: academic / vocational courses
33d3e50229b3c86e1257e3ea0099e972cf758311: 1. Determine the agrupamento based on your residence
08036cb6fbe741f251e5f5c5863d973951c17691: On portaldasmatriculas.edu.gov.pt enter your postal code → list of schools in your area. Priority is given to children from this area.
9017f4099dc7cca9ab15daa07be32594c15c508c: Portal das Matrículas → register using Chave Móvel Digital (government digital signature) + parent's CC (if available).
8f0f79112eee300b8455fdf690c1da831d24a8dc: Main session window for the 2026–2027 academic year: 14 April – 14 May 2026 (Portal das Matrículas, pre-school + 1st grade of 1st cycle). For 2nd/3rd cycle and secondary — their own deadlines (check Despacho for each year). For transfers/moves — at any time, but preferably by the end of July.
31d2a725da99c6ef9252c857b881b160b07836ce: Proof of address (atestado de residência from Junta)
896e75e72cbe0b284f9387615d493f5a1b14e06a: Transcript from previous school (apostille + translation for foreign documents)
2b8a8511c3f42500fbc5c86068c3e992d83cd861: For 1st grade — results by the end of July. For transfers — the school responds within 30 days.
144deeb4091551599af389eb14c8c292f930145e: PLNM — Portuguese as a non-native language
32718d99e48f7b01bb2e93836f33a5e868b6978a: For children who do not speak Portuguese — PLNM programme. Additional language hours (2-5/week), grade adaptation in the first 2 years. Automatically applied upon enrolment of a foreign child in a public school.

174c9d84960e5ae6bead845cc89ef5a30666864a: ASE (Acção Social Escolar) — for low-income families: free meals, transport, excursions

ba3114624471e459e5cd04bbcf969c5bd82cae5f: Typical scams in Portugal and how to avoid them
e2aa0d6cf44e1065cf8e345b6290dadf83c419cd: Scams targeting newcomers in PT: fake rental ads, fake 'representatives' for NIF, phishing from AIMA/Finanças, SMS attacks with QR codes, ATM theft. Consumer protection in the EU is strong — report to PSP, DECO, Banco de Portugal, CICDR. Never pay upfront for something you haven't seen in person.
f23fd95aea8c3d6054b5467a64abf90ab8e23c74: One of the most common types. They target foreigners looking for housing from abroad.
1cb562f384ce4ef83ba34fc4d32c50e8bdfa2e8a: Advertisement: good apartment at below-market price. The 'owner' claims to live in the UK/DE/US, asks for a deposit for 'reservation' via Western Union/crypto/bank transfer before viewing. After the transfer — silence.
0f5721eb3f545483a1ee257b895618cba227f573: RULE: never pay for an apartment you haven't seen in person. Always check that the owner holds the property (extract from Conservatória do Registo Predial).
21ff21d31dfd350adbc9740632040dc1736344e9: The 'Agent' shows an apartment they have no right to rent — they pass the keys, take a caução (deposit), and disappear. The real owner comes by a week later.
011692c5c64d1b8e274f82e3e788ceed3ea7e495: RULE: check the agent's licence in AMI (Associação dos Mediadores Imobiliários, ami.pt). Professional agents have an AMI number, which they indicate in the advertisement.
df121906f8293da34692b44267c3bd42e0ccbaf4: Substitution on the day of signing
d03e279fa4c870a945bdb58503bf1cc11909d7e9: The contract is agreed, but on the day of signing, the 'conditions change' — a higher caução, a shorter term, additional fees.
3e1d94ec91702a1b381a0a625122a95fc9afdfda: RULE: read ALL clauses of the contract. Refuse to sign on the spot — take 24 hours to review. By law, you have the right to do so.
b691e918b1981994e630c8791e896c6bb01c49ac: Officially, NIF from Finanças is free; a fiscal representative for third-country citizens costs €60-150. Some 'services' ask for €300-500. This is overcharging.
02caa2fdf246d1f0f9985260f7cc0d1ebf87f8e9: 'Get your NIF in an hour' from suspicious websites. The issued NIF may be fake or not registered with AT. Without registration in AT, the number is useless.
2e57eab263edfcac0fb8e07e985331aa7823df7b: CHECK: log into Portal das Finanças (tax portal) with the issued NIF and temporary password — if the login works, the NIF is genuine.
d04b81f261cd8d00b2afe6a784c34b7a52c31e45: The 'Representative' continues to receive tax correspondence after obtaining your residence permit — and hides it or extorts you. After obtaining the residence permit, the representative must be officially cancelled on the Portal das Finanças.
a3c857855fa8fb072b644bbd25ed8dbd34a54516: ⚠️ SMS «AIMA: your residence permit has been suspended, click to renew» — phishing. AIMA never sends links via SMS
434059a4339f4b47342b1731bc6b81ceee65726b: ⚠️ Email «Finanças: you owe XXX €, pay via the link» — phishing. AT sends official letters by CTT mail
2af89760be0ff0ba809dd90610d1358a28fb730d: ⚠️ SMS «your bank: suspicious transaction, please confirm» — phishing. Never click on links from SMS
d98de42c9ec10391975aca12b92ca75056759f54: ⚠️ «MB Way: confirm payment with code XXXX» — if you did not initiate it, DO NOT confirm. The scammer has your number + is trying to withdraw money
3a585fcc99c8646231c481b49f1816215091920e: ✅ ALWAYS access the portal officially (via bookmark or Google), not through a link

89d730607e56d0dc00b10cc252d39e14a366746d: ⚠️ «Your card is stuck» — the scammer asks you to enter your PIN again, then takes the card. Never enter your PIN in such a scenario

afb02c4e06f27aff271a16047002d8cbd84cffdb: 🎭 Fake fado/restaurant hosts on the streets — luring you into an ‘authentic’ place where the bill is 3-5 times higher

eb6d45f53674c6c1853c6ee0154fdb73e9b5ce8d: Compensation for cancelled or delayed flights (EU 261/2004)
bef0782052bf6c7434c75df62e78efbafa7150ce: Regulation EU 261/2004 provides fixed compensation of €250 / €400 / €600 for cancelled flights or delays of ≥ 3 hours, as well as the right to care (food, hotel) for flights from PT or to PT on EU airlines. Claims must be submitted to the airline within 30 days. Refusal / silence — complaint to ANAC (National Civil Aviation Authority). Can also be done through services like AirHelp / Flightright for a 25% fee.
7cd8155880403fcb739818109ead86e5d9219a51: ✈️ Flight from an airport in the EU (any carrier) OR to an EU airport on an EU carrier

6d70f9ad026456b90ec0a98835a4a516e2d74642: Force majeure (storm, earthquake, political strikes) — compensation is not due, but the 'care right' still applies.
3b85ec17013db5cc1e9d093af0d875c781ca03c1: 🎟️ These are fixed amounts, NOT dependent on the ticket price
8c386e803c68bae2bc69784479a45bf155685aa9: 🔁 Plus: ticket refund OR rebooking + right to care

71265f8bc0d7e32809489f2a03ee446209531f74: Julgado de Paz (small claims court) for claims < €15,000. Fee €70. Airlines often settle before court.
b9d1fd2ca2e89ca10f95769de9ec032cfd05443b: Distance ~1550 km → compensation €400 per pax. If the reason is technical — yes. If it's a thunderstorm — no.
39e4cc20d0d998b8890518788de8d8cdd0e8b58b: No direct flights since 2022. Flight Lisbon → Istanbul (3000 km) → compensation €400. For Istanbul → Moscow — not EU 261, no compensation.
32bae566ba78223549aee86a57c4218ee7ae0319: < 1500 km → €250. Plus choice: ticket refund OR rebooking on the next flight.
1d3bc0e951762e61540b4626256d5d5e905580d1: Legal assistance in Portugal — how to find and where to get it for free
5b1de7d3f88ed061da53566503321a2f660e659d: In PT, access to legal assistance is a constitutional right. Free legal assistance (Apoio Judiciário) for low-income individuals through Segurança Social (social security). Paid lawyers — from €60/hour to €500+/hour in top firms. Ordem dos Advogados (Portuguese Bar Association) — register of all licensed lawyers. For simple questions, there are free consultations at Junta de Freguesia (parish council) and university clinics.
755495da944ac48893e89bdc4c17b1b657c3df9c: Fully qualified lawyer, licensed by Ordem dos Advogados. Can represent in any court. Mandatory 5-year education + 18 months internship + exam.
f275214e1b20a06284a6db2854df7b05d027f79e: Lawyer with a more limited practice: cannot represent in higher courts. Good for real estate, inheritance, registration. Usually cheaper. Licence — Ordem dos Solicitadores (OSAE).
aae4fc1529f10309605a48126c9dea4f62aa96be: Cannot represent in court. Provides consultations. Often specialist lawyers (immigration, tax) work in this role for foreigners.
156e9fd701025657a936f774fd3a78034d14c5d8: According to Lei 34/2004. Entitled individuals have an income below the threshold. Applies in civil, administrative, and criminal cases.

6998cf2192ebabff409f4a4d2a4ea0005b9884d9: Lei 34/2004 — Access to law and the courts
4e82d65256166dfae89d3454f348b131dbb96780: Process to bring spouse, children, parents after obtaining your own residence permit. Submitted through AIMA (portal-rf.aima.gov.pt). Important: from 2024 (Lei 9/2024 + Lei 61/2025 of 23.10.2025) requires a minimum of 2 years of legal residence in PT BEFORE application. AIMA decision period — up to 9 months (was 90 days). Exceptions: holders of Golden Visa, D3 (EU Blue Card), and several other qualified statuses.

36cafa67ca9ef131d1cd0a90a304d8ecc746e198: Portuguese people drink 3-5 coffees a day. Bica (Lisbon) / Cimbalino (Porto) = small espresso for €0.70-1.00. Main variations — meia de leite, galão, abatanado, pingado. Best chains: Nicola, A Brasileira, Fábrica. Coffee chains (Starbucks) are more expensive and less respected.
8c7aa0d8fd5567a40d68cc5946050c40e2e2e7c8: Café cheio / curto — slightly longer / very short
c6d446f456d56118301b4d47912d1c19d0b83cfa: Pingado — espresso with a drop of milk

66683af9010574e90e31f94f6b04c62cd12ad4b5: In the morning — galão or meia de leite with pastel de nata. After lunch — bica (locals consider galão 'children's' coffee). In the evening — espresso is not forbidden, Portuguese people drink coffee at any time.
9e921b0bb3734d33ea109f17d1fb4acaf69889db: On the menu, the word 'café' usually means 'espresso'. If you want what is typically called 'coffee' — ask for abatanado.

a5932da506f34ac332135528b0fc0d8916102e7f: Pastelaria — the foundation of daily life. A combination of café, bakery, bar, often serving breakfasts and lunches. Fresh pastries in the morning, pastéis de nata all day, tosta mista (ham and cheese sandwich), bifana (pork), prato do dia at lunch.
e382c028f5981617f19ba886447dba2a6fa6af86: Each neighbourhood has its favourite — ask your neighbours.
9bb4f8f41b2c2863255568b5000f64c4bf37e821: Fado — the soul of Portugal and where to hear it
4ad7fa5705a558ed5cd1c0f46a42bce0d6b67b1e: Fado — a genre of Portuguese music, included in UNESCO Intangible Heritage (2011). 'Fado' means 'fate'. Characteristically melancholic, it expresses saudade (longing, nostalgia). Two styles: Lisboa (female/male) and Coimbra (only male, academic). In Lisbon — Alfama, Mouraria, Bairro Alto. Concert with dinner €30-80.
7381c3730d40619f0aa5b33077ab0c14ec286f48: Fado (from Latin 'fatum' — fate) is a genre that originated in Lisbon in the 1820s, with roots in maritime and port songs, Afro-Brazilian rhythms like lundum, and romances. Instruments: classical guitar (viola) + Portuguese guitar (guitarra portuguesa, mandolin-like with 12 strings).
a7f0386d5288a17c5bbb8addd431267e2a7bd066: Themes: unrequited love, the sea, longing for the deceased, nostalgia for the past, poverty, Lisbon. Overall tone — melancholic, but sometimes proud and passionate. Key emotion — saudade (untranslatable: a longing mixed with love).
d78740be310125763a8537c28de67677b1711f9a: More well-known. Sung by men and women. Dressed in black (women in mourning dresses). The audience must be quiet, applause is only at the end. Guitarist(s) sit, fadista stands with closed eyes.
ecf3dc8666e997b3bfc8cc54757dd0db3aa72faf: Academic, from the university town of Coimbra. Sung ONLY by men — students and graduates, in black cloaks (capas e batinas). More formal. Themes: student life, women, the city, farewells.
f67812a0fb9d86ef9e71f7b20120c3441a34b0e1: 👑 Amália Rodrigues (1920-1999) — queen of fado, symbol of Portugal in the 20th century. National pantheon
3e911e1c0124fdcb74d71f8fde9e0a33a2ed3b12: 🎵 Carlos do Carmo (1939-2021) — modernised the genre, recognised worldwide
ecb9017e8444f804584ce05f11e35338af5d12ba: 🎤 Cuca Roseta, Raquel Tavares, Cristina Branco — modern stars

6e3de422633ed55528fe7d5c82cef8b1b9f1a1c5: Restaurants with live fado during dinner. Quality varies greatly — from authentic to touristy. Average price — €30-80 with dinner.

c0ad01deab85fb3a15df301c1ec10f3c5b98e2c9: Football in Portugal is a national religion. “Os Três Grandes” (The Big Three): SL Benfica, FC Porto, Sporting CP. Derby de Lisboa (Benfica vs Sporting) and O Clássico (Benfica vs Porto) are the events of the year. Tickets for regular matches range from €15-60, and for the clássico up to €200. Sóócios (club members) — ~200,000 at Benfica, a world record.
6ca6364be6892e0b6807d59f068d033f94924f26: Founded in 1904. The most decorated — 38 championships in Portugal. Stadium Estádio da Luz (64,642 seats) in Lisbon. Colours are red and white. Mascot — eagle Vítor. Anthem — 'Ser Benfiquista'. Over 250,000 socios — Guinness World Record.
94a9e10c29bf974b70707dc47de97a8ae083d7ca: Founded in 1893. 30 championships. Stadium Estádio do Dragão (50,033). Colours are blue and white. Mascot — dragon. The only Portuguese club in Clube dos 21 (UEFA). UEFA Champions League 1987, 2004.
f6d0c65e591b7b372d550329e68e3240f165dee4: Founded in 1906. 21 championships. Stadium Estádio José Alvalade (50,095). Colours are green and white (striped). Mascot — lion. Alma de Leão. The Alcochete academy is one of the best in the world: produced Cristiano Ronaldo, Luís Figo, João Félix, Nani.
6156864e020c43e2df229d173cae9874429add25: 🔥 O Clássico — Benfica vs FC Porto. The main match in Portugal. 2-3 times a season (Liga + Taça)
b432a2ec7ed1a1261f948175d3c956af3c8f8586: 🔥 Derby de Lisboa — Benfica vs Sporting. The capital rivalry. The city is divided red-green
00e2b2c74f5e836fac8e9f59a997f77c8c0bbac1: 🔥 Derby do Norte / Invicta — FC Porto vs Sporting (less heated, but still a classic)
ac6e18844330a993f2709d3b3236d1d75f6d8d1f: 🔥 Clássico Eterno — Benfica vs Sporting historical feeling
9d5a55bb52dbc24cb9b68b9e1dda2319154b7ea9: On derby days — crowds in the streets, buses with fans, televisions in all cafes. The official RTP commentator cries with emotion — a tradition.

c2af745b00076bf8a444804320ec79272a9ae87c: Football in PT — is not just a sport. Club affiliation is passed down from father to son (not chosen). Asking: “Are you from Benfica, Porto or Sporting?” — is normal small talk. 80% of the population supports one of the “Três Grandes”.
150d6ac0697715e3310e9aaeb1f6b38cf9004ea2: Regional clubs: FC Braga, Vitória SC (Guimarães), Rio Ave, Boavista — form the “Primeira Liga”, but have never won the championship (except Boavista in 2001 — the only time it was NOT Benfica/Porto/Sporting).
6b980911cbd64e492d7fb49bf411e980805bc046: Municipal markets — a living tradition: fresh fish, meat, vegetables, spices. The main ones in Lisbon: Mercado da Ribeira (Time Out), Mercado de Campo de Ourique, Arroios, 31 de Janeiro. In Porto — the legendary Mercado do Bolhão. Open from 7:00 to 14:00 (main hours), some until the evening like food halls.

f258886c0aaea26496749599ed69c1fb1554b203: Cais do Sodré. In the morning — traditional market (fish, meat). Noon to night — Time Out Market with 30+ food kiosks from top chefs in PT. Very touristy, but the quality is high.
2de6b782d13a01997b5e1507bb81fbbc02e4c5b5: Less touristy, more 'for locals'. There is also a food court in the evening. The Campo de Ourique area is pleasant for a stroll.
5c9f21b0fb71775c1fad80d28aa1c864b9a39829: Saldanha. Large, authentic, cheap. Locals love it. Close to the metro.

8bb0464444dbe5cece9efc8b45d68277ccbbd0fa: Legendary. After the renovation in 2022 — clean, but retains its spirit. Fresh fish, meat, bread, flowers, cheeses. Authentic in the morning.
e8fc3018e519aa56152f45e62aefd32a420a29e5: Iron building by the Douro River. Not a food market, but 'Hard Club' inside — concerts and events.
d7ed1d128c36f5d8a5a4341e63a6aff9c0d235c6: Boavista. A modern food hall with boutiques, similar to Time Out. Lunch spot.

95f33064d9d3b389fa8e6d2c9acb7e4e2e62bcf3: What to definitely try in Portugal — by region
71b13de99c9c13cd556258abfeb7b340ce1e9a01: Portuguese cuisine — region by region. Lisbon: sardines, ameijoas à bulhão pato. Porto: francesinha, tripas. Alentejo: cozido, açorda. North: caldo verde. Madeira: espetadas. Azores: cozido das Furnas. The iconic dish is bacalhau (cod), with '365 recipes'. And pastéis de nata for dessert — everywhere.
66d03ce4b7968d653c1003a3ed4f6b0d93b750b4: 🐟 Sardinhas assadas — grilled sardines, season June–September. Feast Santo António (13 June) — sardine day
685fb0217e413a2dda9919f1f1be57f10d3b1eca: 🐚 Ameijoas à Bulhão Pato — clams in a garlic-lime broth with coriander
6a120042ae749c71a1cd599c83407bc353484882: 🍲 Bacalhau à Brás — shredded cod with potatoes and egg, 'comfort food #1'
4490c5e79b99c310d4d90b8965db4b6438808d61: 🍛 Arroz de marisco — seafood rice in tomato sauce
f49efede77586c45703af0c0bca5ed34746f7e3b: 🧀 Queijo da Serra da Estrela — soft sheep's cheese DOP, from August to March
69bf01ec31fd0c544ab57b94c502b0f601ab56e1: 🥐 Pastéis de nata — custard in a crispy pastry, with cinnamon on top
ac186c81c3e4f1f44cf36f0ad407e997ef1cc2f7: 🍷 Vinho de Carcavelos — historic fortified white wine from the Cascais region
f6bb99308f01b246e7a616c6ce5f1ebf525b82d1: 🥪 Francesinha — a sandwich monster with meat, sausage, melted cheese, and a beer and tomato sauce. An icon of Porto
04b24f2469a3e70ed6b41eb30937090951a9a374: 🥬 Caldo verde — a soup made from kale and potatoes with chouriço. A national winter dish
4c8d1b33a9fdefb73b2a0066bbae6917f26f1801: 🐄 Tripas à moda do Porto — tripe with beans. People from Porto are called 'tripeiros' for this dish
1abec7cd878fc2842f7be04412a6074b5c210d66: 🍷 Vinho verde — a young light wine with a slight sparkle, the best regional option
80eac72de8a8bb564d7ee13154ef0171e5696185: 🍷 Porto — a sweet fortified wine, from tawny to vintage. Tasting in the Gaia cellars
372256bdfbaf23f0e3137da55766a2ba502207c7: 🐟 Cabidela — chicken/rabbit cooked in its own blood, a traditional dish from Minho
ca79a1663ab1082d3eadc84ae5620de22ce53c01: 🥖 Bolinhos de bacalhau — codfish balls, a snack found everywhere
0f9447a1e9bc606fb3545e0c3fea40a0f144ed46: 🍲 Açorda alentejana — a bread soup with egg, coriander, garlic, and olive oil
abef2fa1124c4e3bacb2fa210fef371398c6f901: 🐷 Carne de porco à alentejana — pork with clams (amêijoas). Famous for its 'sea-land' combination
225d690317590ce79bee0297a75c62520bb8b05b: 🐑 Ensopado de borrego — lamb stew served on bread

876a0580035285a9c7aec0d6946791191c6610cc: SNS (public system) is free for residents, but waiting times are 2–8 weeks for specialists. Private insurance speeds things up — consultations on the same day, MRI within a week. Top providers: Médis, Multicare (Fidelidade), AdvanceCare, Tranquilidade. Prices 2026: €30–80/month for basic plan, €100–250/month for full.

5a15a4c0b29ea3834da3f29009d46d6f843be4c2: PT provides quality pregnancy care through SNS free of charge for residents with utente. 9 mandatory consultations + 3 ultrasounds. Births in public maternity hospitals are free, in private ones €3,500-€8,000. Maternity leave is 120-180 days with full or partial pay. The child is registered at the Conservatória on day 20.
5ba7b79b8f7df3eff29e839feaeb4c02bfe82c93: Pregnancy care in SNS — free for all legal residents with Número de Utente (SNS patient number). The quality of medical care is high; most maternity hospitals are public with modern facilities.
643ad1464a436d7c69905a4ab5e09d71ca3a8fbb: Alternative — private clinics (Luz Saúde, CUF, Lusíadas, Trofa Saúde). Pros: individual obstetrician-gynaecologist, comfortable rooms, shorter waiting times. Cons: high cost, sometimes overuse of procedures.
ad37f863b66189018bfc8802975dfde9c687c825: Positive test → appointment with a family doctor at Centro de Saúde (public health clinic) or with a private gynaecologist (€25-100 for the first appointment).
1061f07789efb8949ee86f0ec689be5485453dc3: The family doctor refers to the maternity department at Centro. A ‘Processo Clínico’ is opened in SNS24, and a boletim de grávida is issued — a green booklet that records all appointments and tests.
a5d2139c464c7155c51c5c5deb218deb8f3bdd3b: From 23 weeks, you can submit a preliminary application for Subsídio Parental (Parental Allowance) to Segurança Social Direta (online social security portal) so that payments start immediately after birth.

4c76fd8c7f38720811d8913da16577b310e4e5ee: Additional tests automatically: TORCH, blood type, HIV, syphilis, hepatitis, urine monthly.

792a8c5f755921f8a1730d39c30e71bcab62e3bf: 🏥 Choosing a maternity hospital: by default — hospital in the area. You can register at another one via request
f023658197e0db66cd25bf4a047efae721228e92: 📋 Birth Plan (plano de parto) — your wishes: epidural, position, music, father at the birth
7166be59d6bde8f6060c3898d10d2344d5abc011: 🎒 Bag for the maternity hospital: medical documents, clothes for mother and baby, hygiene products
8eb9c8bef5fed915a78862b2207849906aa95a3c: 🚗 Route to the maternity hospital — know in advance, especially for night deliveries
b13b9644c8313788a954facc66e8c670819c2d28: 📞 SNS24 line (808 24 24 24) — assistance in critical cases
ddea266620d843eb64ce7dc75a8d8fd3940d2999: Hospitalisation at the first signs of active labour or planned (if caesarean). In SNS usually 1-2 days after vaginal, 3-4 days after caesarean. In private clinics longer, if you wish.
c45ed511a2591b4be4d2b790bc4cc70c1e329b41: Immediately after birth — basic procedures: Apgar, measurements, first skin-to-skin contact, vitamin K. In PT, the government standard is skin-to-skin contact (contato pele-a-pele) for a minimum of 1 hour.
046736f7c660bf8e66c801b4c0e04ba4f87ac1b8: In the maternity hospital, there is a Balcão do Nado Vivo — a single window where you can apply for the Assento de Nascimento on the day of birth. Alternatively, you can go to the Conservatória within 20 days. Free of charge.
31ec7985434bfec918908b69230af24cd5399fa9: Boletim de Saúde Infantil (child health booklet)

1ac186f2ec5d3504753c94aa102954943869bf61: NIF (Portuguese tax ID) for the child (automatically upon registration)
681429ac62f378914d07c8fb7cb82080405509ad: Número de Utente for the child (automatically)
aade87dede06eca554c5d33c7c8ca8b288cc3b24: 180 days — 90% (if both parents take a minimum of 30 days each; Lei 13/2023 / Agenda do Trabalho Digno, previously 83%)
995751bbc9c2674cefff1606cec5c87d84b82bcf: Father — mandatory 20 days of **Licença Parental Exclusiva do Pai** + 8 additional (optional) = up to 28 days (Lei 90/2019)
9393a52c4bfbf9b4f8989caf29606417e382ff11: Both parents have the right to leave as employees, self-employed, unemployed (under the relevant conditions)
9fb56bbbb3dfdc81507330b558b290b59998bc75: **Subsídio Parental** is paid by **Segurança Social**. It is calculated based on the average salary of the last 6 months. Application through **Segurança Social Direta**, usually automatically after registering the child.
b3c3e2f63e8fec56443b0d63300ad9e72f50c662: **Licença parental complementar** — up to 3 months additional, 25% of salary
e954927219103c308fad0a1360abb20efcffe1fc: **Licença para assistência a filho** — up to 2 years unpaid (guarantee of return to work)
f1986d61b0f7fe1ba5fd2eb92554381b6a405319: Breaks for breastfeeding up to 1 year — 2× 30 minutes a day paid
80dd540ea36d7215b91a1dc3091e96699b308017: Part-time work — at the mother's discretion until the child is 3 years old
3adab35ff2644b589665f14c7ee31f2b7b70fbfe: **Bónus Bebé** (2026) — a one-off payment of €146 per child (1st income tier)
0557219903117a5dc40ebc42065884a35b3a574d: **Subsídio Parental** income (complementary allowance) — in some cases
7a2c18f5be5949601f34444a97d16423762777ff: **Abono de Família** (child benefit) — monthly from birth (see separate guide)
f382d2810637e7c8310f167c5ccd7006b4b0e48d: ✅ Modern maternity hospitals (especially Maternidade Alfredo da Costa, Hospital Santa Maria in Lisbon, S. João in Porto)
594084f6069b6e63cef78b581bf2488e2321aa67: ❌ You do not choose your doctor; each appointment is different
b86b140b768575f1d6d80b14e1dc509785824fe4: ❌ Standard rooms (2-4 mothers in a room)
f0b1e761d9de03d6fded37d1cf4ee821c43cbaba: ✅ Your obstetrician-gynaecologist manages the pregnancy and delivers the baby

709b242a5ff0e1220b7320c5d03ae36598c9bff8: Private health insurance — how the market works
69333a737d117c871a6dba77616c1aa8f56efeab: Private insurance in PT — a supplement to SNS, not a replacement. The main point: quick access to specialists in private clinic networks. The market is regulated by ASF (Autoridade de Supervisão de Seguros). Typical cost for one adult: €25-40/month for a basic plan, €40-80 for average, €80-150 for comprehensive. For a family of four — from €120/month. Key parameters for comparison — annual limit, co-payments, and waiting periods.
d0165e9a53c2ffd93b307042a67b35b53f949031: How SNS and private insurance complement each other
97a2b2d2d743b74b5c4230a0224ac403fb1874fb: SNS — a universal system, funded by taxes, free for legal residents. Strong for emergencies, chronic illnesses, hospitalisations. Weak on waiting times for scheduled appointments with specialists — 1–12 months depending on the region and specialty.
4c866832f141d64b5f30a2951aff78467e4a98f5: Private insurance covers visits to private clinics (largest networks: Luz Saúde, CUF, Lusíadas, HPA, Trofa Saúde). Appointments with specialists usually within 1-3 days. Many services that SNS hardly covers (full dental care, psychotherapy, ophthalmology) are available in private insurance.
f77f91026e3f1b77d5db0fbc9e0c38778ed9e7de: As of 2026, approximately 10 insurers specialising in health are licensed and active. ASF publishes a list at asf.com.pt. The largest market shares are held by several insurers, partially affiliated with banking groups:
bc43a037e7e4572c1515bda7c161cb3566890f76: Medical insurers affiliated with banking groups (Médis / Millennium BCP; Multicare / Fidelidade)
9021cbf05864b4d7508be594738f0201c9c84065: Specialised international: Allianz Care, Cigna Global (for expats)
7b90053dbd2c31973277cd36e63ca425847cee49: Reputable insurers for families: Tranquilidade Saúde (Generali), Liberty Saúde
1bcfc3c40b3c3f3890705782eab7970645043d30: B2B products for employees: Advancecare (through Mercer)
4ded769eb91d1bef62254fb4a8c42db3c93bd41e: When searching, look for «seguro de saúde» in search. All licensed insurers are listed in the public ASF register.
bb163e4c0ecd8ccf21f2f6fc5c8b506407b8f7cb: Plafond anual — annual payout limit (from €10,000 to unlimited)
55a35cf0f6d7d7920823759085409d2f84bd81bc: Co-payment — patient co-pay for each service (€15-35 per appointment — typical)
e551203150d5d4788df70b4fd7c51522a24e9706: Período de carência — waiting period before accessing services: usually 30-60 days for outpatient care, 180-365 days for pregnancy, oncology, dentistry
91f16ada32e4cb731e2774f760c07fc7a5434ca5: Rede de prestadores — network of clinics: the wider, the better
a2c061c0f24495abbefabb12e36892e2ef416b2b: Dentistry — often a separate module with a limit
31f7f97898f1d97340a0c3c445c87782623ab1e0: International coverage — usually an option for families travelling
e0b8fdccd25667890e10a2dfd7c5cf56edde962b: Chronic conditions — must be declared; often excluded from coverage
726b972b9a01793de08e64913de28a6770df81df: Age surcharges — policy costs 20-50% more after age 60
ce08b88afbd906f58e604c7ebf80f8b377267d96: Through insurance company websites directly or via aggregator brokers. ASF requires that all quotes are complete and comparable. Get at least 3 quotes for comparison.
7a4d4fdd89f8229fd64eb3424c602a4c8d6a47bf: The medical questionnaire is mandatory. Declare all chronic illnesses, surgeries, and medications taken. Falsehood is grounds for denial of payment in the event of a claim and cancellation of the policy.
b8af1bee7646e9f3cfbe88654c071437a760ea30: Based on the questionnaire, the insurer may: accept standard; accept with a surcharge (agravamento); exclude specific illnesses (exclusões); deny.
6793d9cea3cf2b55af0403146b9d6ce5fdf78642: Usually online. Payment by card or direct debit. The policy is active from the next day (but a waiting period applies).
c3410579810e48ce372b1009822175b30294a9bf: The physical card arrives by post, the digital one in the insurer's app. It is shown at the clinic along with your CC/residence permit.
800dec44b202826a0ff707461e89a6a05b9baa70: The 'rede convencionada' model is the most convenient: the clinic is part of the insurer's network, you only pay a co-payment, the rest is billed directly.
d1a2953f81079c0e087119e243fb55b6e3ad606e: Out of network — 'reembolso' model: you pay in full, then submit receipts and a request to the insurer, receiving a refund to your account usually within 30 days.
61af7c46e7efa785c792efd93bff89d97a1d8cd9: A key point — the contract is governed by the Ley do Contrato de Seguro (Decreto-Lei 72/2008). The insurer is obliged to explain the denial in writing. Appeals are through ASF and Provedor do Cliente.
7310d38d5498c37e26a12878909ac94611674718: Do not take out a policy ‘online in a minute’ without reading the **Condições Gerais** — exceptions are often overlooked.
598c089c997bbd9ee876779b8978e00d892ccdaf: For families with children, check the vaccination and paediatric coverage.
e95c20d7c4716a77be703f1fe53caeb94a3163f9: If you are planning a pregnancy, the policy should be arranged at least 10 months in advance.
4109cd1dc27f7255341c8cd8f76e33ffd64e0740: For travelling expats, a policy with an international component (Allianz, Cigna) may be more advantageous.
546a67b32a717de243401f36e3c4e394d7cd9735: If your employer offers B2B insurance, it is usually cheaper than individual plans and without questionnaires.
9a685319f2811dda00a9dcffefb6b2c2095af038: IRS deduction: insurance contributions are partially deductible (category ‘**despesas de saúde**’).
01170a607a765136c5f25d1de8a860ddf871340c: When changing jobs, maintain your insurance, as the **carência** resets with a new purchase.
8432940b9ea8c1595e99ce1bd817a3c773d214a1: Registration with SNS and obtaining número de utente
4cc970fe27c2eb3d3310bd3020c41624ca53a6a7: Número de utente — personal number in the Portuguese public healthcare system. Grants access to free appointments with a family doctor, hospitalisation, and subsidised prescriptions. It is issued at the Centro de Saúde (public health centre) in your area after obtaining a residence permit and NISS.
08771b98aefe65e67cd795ee830decee376e8e99: Número de utente — a 9-digit identifier in SNS. Without it, appointments are charged as for non-residents.
32c01f0d2ac76b1a4a35efb9dab9f203c1ae20c7: Provides: free family doctor (médico de família), consultations, tests, emergency services 112, hospitalisation, subsidised pharmacy (up to 90% discount on prescriptions), vaccinations.
9eee644550691b7dbb92f015de272fa9a8033386: At sns24.gov.pt or sns.pt using your postal code.
db9c9e87380308e81ea3a9ddcfea3c04f10e30b0: Residence permit or cartão de cidadão
73e0c64d2f5ca2572813d892456faefe012f7bbd: Proof of address (atestado de residência issued by Junta de Freguesia or utility bill)
b187efab039b986ed705d2460f2ad009a5436590: The centre will register you and assign a utente number. Sometimes a temporary one is issued, the permanent one arrives later.
3694b98b6dae2dfb9a5967ef8dbee10126d136fa: From immediate to 6 months depending on the region. In Lisbon/Porto, the queue is longer, in the provinces it’s quicker.
1dc512c60a6c5cd823e40679d9a11a47ae2f050f: If you do not yet have a residence permit
d0087cc535699d6ef12638c6d5492ff91a606bd2: By law, SNS is obliged to accept everyone who is in Portugal (including undocumented migrants) — access has been expanded since 2023. But in practice, they refuse without documents. Request an "atestado de residência" from Junta de Freguesia and this counts as proof.
1e8a2fe448b29352e712845d64c54aec793dd2b8: Pregnant women, children, and severe conditions — admission is guaranteed without documents for emergency reasons.
d44aa8028a3f770e039bdd7243b94bd09e442561: SNS + private is common practice. Popular ones: Médis, Multicare (Fidelidade), Tranquilidade. From €25/month for a basic plan to €80/month for a full plan. Covers private clinics and reduces waiting times.
0283b4de2452208b40031456b8fe1d4c9f83c674: Buying property in Portugal — step by step
7bedb62e26ae9f46857e84f4a8742d4e736c47e6: Foreigners can purchase property without restrictions. The process: NIF → search → CPCV + deposit 10% → financing/due diligence → deed at the notary → registration. Taxes: IMT (1-10% progressively), IS 0.8%. Total costs 8-12% on top of the price.

b536ea1806b0cab89348e99ada86de7e18e964c2: Real estate agents (agentes imobiliários) — commission paid by the seller (usually 5%)
87a601df41b5d943bdcffa82a8ed23d8e514fc98: Prices in 2026 in Lisbon: €4000-8000/m² city centre, €3000-5000/m² suburbs. Algarve: €2500-6000/m². North (Braga, Coimbra): €1500-3000/m².

0283f7369d873c89a96b70475be61268e640ef13: All of this is checked by a lawyer — about 1-2 weeks.
ca072dea13f4569545159222c669ee9c0c70d655: Preliminary contract. Stronger than an ambitious offer. Binds both parties.

1d60653c9acfdaf4eb072fee1822ad15651c5e59: Penalties for termination: buyer refuses — loses sinal; seller — returns sinal × 2
099278d372973d6317e76cd20313e73f65a685e5: The notary collects the relevant **certidões** (certificates), checks the parties, and prepares the draft.

6798cd1b5c44c9f5ea703658e3a8411b6dd5e158: IMT+IS 0% from August 2024 per DL 44/2024 — significant benefit
fafa052f83f887a92bb158ff9233bf830fe9b600: IMT for buyers from tax havens
9ffdcd7f1ca5a573ffb268df1a4b3117ce59a35c: 0.8% of the price (for young people under 35 = 0%)
ab9a80752e0eb8447184fc76aefcbd566332e41d: 0.3-0.45% of fiscal value, rate set by Câmara Municipal
9d892e193893ba17ec48d945a11359345f6ee295: Foreign residents can obtain a mortgage of up to 80-90% of the property value in PT banks. Non-residents can get up to 60-70%. Euribor 6m Q1 2026 — ~2.0–2.3% (down from a peak of 4% at the end of 2023). Typical PT spreads are 0.6–1.5%. Therefore, the real rate is 2.7–3.8%. The term can be up to 40 years or until the age of 75-80. The process takes 30-90 days from the moment of submission of the dossier.
f5dbd35bcc9b53bf97a7050709d9363780b3a262: PT residents with income in €/PT — up to 90% of the value (primary residence) or 80% (second home)
ec86e43f96b9f60c8cf6b7919ac396312c191ee1: EU citizens — on par with PT
d132857c557224b32dba677c61df51c026642c75: Non-EU citizens with a residence permit ≥ 2 years — standard conditions
0debd9a8ec12740609f57a68b56c40d77aaba5c6: Russian citizens since 2022 face restrictions at some banks — fewer options, interest rates may be higher. Check with the specific bank.
17f8ef03a43d6bbfa8a5c517057c189c1cf9c628: Euribor 6m Q1 2026 ≈ 2.0–2.3% (after a peak of ~4% in 2023). Spread 0.6–1.5%. Total 2.7–3.8%. Recalculated every 6 months.
dcf6128c5153ab57b75fab5286caf2268a58b085: For 5-20 years. ~3.0-4.0% in 2026. Protects against fluctuations, but is less flexible.
544b5a5602dccbf3acef6f680acfa09c8df53b38: Fixed for the first 5-10 years → floating. Popular among foreigners.
8e8f166af49743e974917fe1728dad5e5dc2cfbc: Credit history (for non-PT — certificate from the country of residence)
